options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: Char_Gender
options.description: Sets Character Gender in Game NOTE: you can change this by interacting the wardrobe in the house in oakwood village

options.name: Char_Skin
options.description: Sets Character Skin color in Game NOTE: you can change this by interacting the wardrobe in the house in oakwood village

options.name: Char_Hairstyle
options.description: Sets Character Hairstyle in Game NOTE: you can change this by interacting the wardrobe in the house in oakwood village

options.name: Char_Haircolor
options.description:
Sets Character Hair Color in Game NOTE: you can change this by interacting the wardrobe in the house in oakwood village
NOTE 2: Male Chars only have 3 hair colors so if option 3 is selected it will be changed to option 2

options.name: Char_Outfit
options.description: Sets Character Outfit in Game NOTE: you can change this by interacting the wardrobe in the house in oakwood village

options.name: goal
options.description:
sets what the goal is
mission = complete all main missions
catch = catch all spirits
rare = catch all rare spirits
affection = catch and get Lv5 affection with all spirits

options.name: Randomise_Spawns
options.description: randomise the spawns in the grass/water NOTE will also randomise what spirit is obtained through the "Simulated Scuffle" and "Gold Plated" side quests

options.name: Grass_slots
options.description: number of spirit slots in the grass

options.name: Water_slots
options.description: number of spirit slots in the water

options.name: Randomise_Enemies
options.description: randomise the enemies team of spirits

options.name: Enemy_Vision
options.description: Enable/Disable Enemy Vision

options.name: Enemy_Spin
options.description: Sets whether Enemy's will stand sill, spin in a circle or randomly rotate

options.name: Randomise_Spirit_Moves
options.description: randomise moves learned by spirits

options.name: Randomise_Spirit_Moves_Amount
options.description: number of move to randomise on to spirits

options.name: Randomise_Spirit_Evo
options.description: randomise Evolution for spirits

options.name: Randomise_Spirit_Type
options.description: randomise Type for spirits

options.name: Randomise_Spirit_Stats
options.description: randomise stats for spirits

options.name: Randomise_Move_Data
options.description: randomise Move Data

options.name: Randomise_Type_Effective
options.description: randomise Type effectiveness

options.name: Spirit_Locations
options.description: have catch/obtaining spirits as locations

options.name: Spirit_Affection
options.description:
have affection lv for spirits as locations
NOTE: requires Spirit_Locations to be true

options.name: Rare_Locations
options.description:
have catch/obtaining rare spirits as locations
NOTE: requires Spirit_Locations to be true

options.name: Spirit_Obtain_progression
options.description: Stop Progression Items being behind Spirit Obtain Locations

options.name: Rare_Spirit_Obtain_progression
options.description: Stop Progression Items being behind Rare Spirit Obtain Locations

options.name: Spirit_Affection_progression
options.description: Stop Progression Items being behind Spirit Affection Locations

options.name: randomise_map
options.description: randomise map

options.name: randomise_map_option
options.description:
sets map rando option
none (default) = no logic in how the map is connected
some = exits that lead to dead ends will always lead to dead ends

options.name: randomise_warps
options.description: add warp locations/items to the rando pool

options.name: Main_Missions
options.description: enable/disable Main Missions

options.name: Side_Missions
options.description: enable/disable Side Missions

options.name: Single_Catch
options.description:
enable or disable to limit only a single spirit to be caught per map/route
NOTE: requires "Spirit_Locations" to be set to false

options.name: Deathlink
options.description: enable or disable Deathlink

options.name: Minigame_Cheat
options.description: set to enable cheat so sex minigame cant miss

options.name: Guaranteed_Catch
options.description: set to make sprit crystals catch guaranteed

options.name: Xp_Modifer
options.description:
Modifier to XP gained.
0 -> no XP gained
50 -> 1/2 XP gained
100 -> XP not effected
200 -> 2x XP gained

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
options: Seed of Life Available in Shop
Golden Seed of Life Available in Shop

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.
options: Seed of Life Available in Shop
Golden Seed of Life Available in Shop

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"
options: Seed of Life Available in Shop
Golden Seed of Life Available in Shop

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: Seed of Life Available in Shop
Golden Seed of Life Available in Shop

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
